tasks: Developed new features for legacy Windows applications using C#, while also maintaining and fixing broken functionality in older VB-based apps to ensure system stability.
Contributed to PI planning by identifying challenges, proposing actionable solutions, and documenting strategies to enhance alignment and efficiency between business and IT teams.

Developed a health monitoring system and dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Azure Workbooks, enabling real-time tracking of resource failures across 50+ applications and reducing detection times to 10-15 minutes, thereby enhancing business responsiveness.

Took ownership of a legacy project, resolving recurring failures, deployment issues, and functional instability. Successfully stabilized the system, which supports subscription management for over 50K vendors and 1 million members.

Modernized legacy applications by transitioning from TFS to Git, updating framework versions, and implementing automated CI/CD pipelines, resulting in a 20% improvement in system performance and faster deployments.
Collaborated with peers to implement microservices using .NET 8, RabbitMQ, and Web API, restructuring legacy applications to enhance member subscription processing and system scalability.
Led and mentored a small team of junior developers, providing guidance and oversight to ensure quality and efficiency in project deliverables.
eveloped and maintained software applications following the team’s best practices and processes, consistently delivering high‐quality, maintainable software.
Effectively collaborated with peers and the QA team to gather requirements, resolve issues, and manage time‐sensitive updates, ensuring project success.
Demonstrated leadership and technical skills, capable of handling demanding project tasks, resolving issues, and meeting deadlines.
Conducted regular code reviews and pair programming sessions, providing constructive feedback and guidance to junior developers
